tasks.label: Install to Obsidian
tasks.command: mkdir -p "/Users/xuan/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/xuan/.obsidian/plugins/journal-partner" && cp /Users/xuan/VSCodeProjects/Journal-partner/main.js "/Users/xuan/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/xuan/.obsidian/plugins/journal-partner/" && cp /Users/xuan/VSCodeProjects/Journal-partner/manifest.json "/Users/xuan/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/xuan/.obsidian/plugins/journal-partner/" && cp /Users/xuan/VSCodeProjects/Journal-partner/styles.css "/Users/xuan/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/xuan/.obsidian/plugins/journal-partner/" && echo 'Done' && ls "/Users/xuan/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/xuan/.obsidian/plugins/journal-partner/"

tasks.label: git init and commit
tasks.command: cd /Users/xuan/VSCodeProjects/Journal-partner && git init && git add . && git commit -m 'feat: initial release of Journal Partner plugin' && echo '--- git init done ---'

tasks.label: Sync to Obsidian
tasks.command: cp /Users/xuan/VSCodeProjects/Journal-partner/{main.js,styles.css} "/Users/xuan/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/xuan/.obsidian/plugins/journal-partner/" && echo '✅ 已同步到 Obsidian'

tasks.label: git push
tasks.command: cd /Users/xuan/VSCodeProjects/Journal-partner && git add -A && git commit -m 'feat: add circular checkbox toggle setting' && git push
